[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / noLights

# Method: noLights()

```ts
noLights(): void;
```

Remove all active lights (ambient and point) and reset light falloff to `(1, 0, 0)`.

Useful when you want later draw calls in the same frame to render unlit.

## Returns

`void`

## Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="noLights" encoded-code="" />
